creator: destination_wellknown
caption: Planning a Thailand trip? 👇  I’ve been on quite a few day trips out on the water in Thailand and it’s always hard to pinpoint the best one (as the whole country is so stunning), but I’m gonna go out on a limb here: my day trip to Hong Island and Koh Lao Lading were the best day trip I’ve ever been on in Thailand.  Of course, there were other people, but I was surprised there weren’t more.   For example, the “4 islands” right outside of Ao Nang are way more crowded, and obviously, Phi Phi and Maya Bay are a whole different story…   So if you’re in this part of Thailand (the Krabi region), I’d highly recommend going on a day trip to the Hong Islands 🙌  #thailand #traveltips #krabi #aonang

transcription.text: Don't visit Thailand without going on a day trip to these islands So this is my fifth time in Thailand and I've been all over the country But I think I've just found my favorite set of islands and I also keep seeing on social media that Thailand is so overcrowded But my favorite part of the day trip was getting lunch on this little remote beach that our small group had to ourselves I stayed in Khao Noi where it only took around 20 minutes to reach the islands But you can also get there pretty quickly on day trips from Ao Nang in Krabi So make sure you visit the Hong Islands if you're ever in Thailand
